name: research-autopilot
description: Plugin-first research routing and multi-agent orchestration layer for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Route research work, plan project-type multi-agent runs, and expose evidence-aware workflow contracts.
interface.longDescription: Research Autopilot is the public plugin layer of Codex Research Stack. It routes research tasks before execution, upgrades project-type work into structured multi-agent planning, and keeps citation, writing, and evidence workflows behind explicit contracts instead of hidden heuristics.
defaultPrompt: Route this research task automatically and explain the plan before execution.
Show which research route, quality gates, and profiles this task needs.
Turn this project task into a structured multi-agent dispatch.
